reasoning: The ISO27001 A.13.1 control focuses on network security management, which directly maps to Kubernetes NetworkPolicies and service configurations. NetworkPolicies can enforce ingress and egress restrictions, ensuring that pods are not accessible from unauthorized networks, similar to cloud security group rules. Additionally, restricting service types like NodePort helps prevent exposing services directly to the internet, aligning with the control's intent to manage network access securely.
title: Network Security Management
